Home  ›  About Bret

Meet Bret Swope

Founder of AltaMedicare and your local Utah Medicare guide. Here's a little about who I am and why I do this work.

Bret Swope

Founder · Licensed Medicare Agent

Based in Orem, Utah

Why I Started AltaMedicare

I started AltaMedicare because I watched too many people in my own community struggle to make sense of Medicare. They’d get bombarded with mailers, called by out-of-state agents who didn’t know Utah, and pressured into plans that didn’t actually fit their lives.

My approach is different. I take the time to understand your situation, explain Medicare in plain English, and walk you through your options — without pushing you toward any particular plan. If a Medicare Supplement makes more sense for you than Medicare Advantage, I’ll tell you. If your current plan is already a good fit, I’ll tell you that too.

What You Can Expect

  • An educational first. I want you to actually understand your options, not just sign something.
  • Local Utah knowledge. I know which doctors, hospitals, and pharmacies are in which networks — because I live here too.
  • No pressure, ever. If you need time to think, take time. If you want to bring a family member, please do.
  • Annual reviews. Plans change every year. I check in each fall to make sure yours still fits.
  • Help year-round. If you have a billing question in March or a prescription issue in July, I’m here.

My Mission

To make Medicare feel less confusing, less stressful, and less expensive for Utah families — one honest conversation at a time.

Want to chat?

There’s no cost, no obligation, and no high-pressure pitch. Just a real conversation about your Medicare options. Call (801) 368-0700 or schedule a time that works for you.

Have Questions? Let's Talk.

One free, no-pressure call — clear answers, no sales pitch.

Schedule Consultation Call (801) 368-0700
AltaMedicare

Trusted local Medicare education and guidance for Utah families. Based in Orem, serving the entire state.

Contact

(801) 368-0700

Orem, Utah

Mon–Fri: 9am–6pm MT

Schedule a Call

We do not offer every plan available in your area. Currently we represent organizations which offer plans in Utah. Please contact Medicare.gov, 1-800-MEDICARE, or your local State Health Insurance Assistance Program (SHIP) to get information on all of your options.

Have a Medicare question?

Bret personally responds — usually within a few hours.
